title: VG Artifacts
description: A datapack that adds famous items from various video games, such as mario and zelda!
body:
**VG Artifacts is a datapack that adds various famous video game items, namely the Master Sword, the Mythic Goldfish, and a Mario Mushroom.**

These items are extremely powerful, but also extremely rare.

Mythic Goldfish:
1/1,000,000 fishing pulls will give you a Mythic Goldfish, which will instantly kill anything you throw it at.

Mario Mushroom:
1/1,000 mooshroom will drop a Mario Mushroom upon spawning, which gives you more height and health, so have a watchful eye!

Master Sword:
Very Rarely you can find a Master Sword pedastal in the Dark Forest, but you can't pull it unless you have a total of 40 HP
